subtasks.description: Verify user has permission to update contract terms for TechFlow Solutions (access control and policy compliance check)
Update TechFlow Solutions contract record to extend term by 12 months (modify end_date field)
Notify procurement team of contract term extension for TechFlow Solutions via multitool orchestration (email/system notification)

plan.cost_rationale: Three sequential subtasks required: (1) policy_action (small tier) for permission verification—straightforward access control check; (2) mongo_query (small tier) for a single document update operation with a date calculation; (3) multitool_plan (small tier) to execute a notification via the enterprise tool registry (email/Slack/system alert). All are simple, single-operation tasks. Dependencies are linear: permission check must pass before update, update must complete before notification. Cost is minimal across small-tier agents.

output.reason: Cannot evaluate permission without: (1) authenticated user identity and role; (2) policy registry definitions; (3) contract access control matrix; (4) TechFlow Solutions vendor classification and approval thresholds. 12-month contract extension typically requires procurement authority, contract owner approval, and potentially finance/legal review depending on contract value and terms.
applied_constraints: User identity not provided - cannot verify authentication
User role not provided - cannot determine authorization level
Policy registry not provided - cannot evaluate against defined policies
Contract value/terms not specified - cannot assess approval requirements
Vendor classification not provided - cannot determine approval workflow
Pending verification of user's contract modification authority
Pending verification of amendment approval requirements

arguments.subject: Contract Term Extension Notification - TechFlow Solutions
arguments.body: The contract term for TechFlow Solutions has been extended by 12 months. Updated record: $2.modified_count record(s) updated.

arguments.message: 📋 Contract Update: TechFlow Solutions contract term extended by 12 months. Vendor: TechFlow Solutions | Records Updated: $2.modified_count | Audit Log: $3.log_id
